历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including the Agricultural College batch) were approximately 14,006, 78, 3,327, 115, and 128, respectively, with large fluctuations mainly due to the presence or absence of the Agricultural College batch; in the recent two years (2024–2025), excluding the Agricultural College batch, the minimum rankings for the regular category were approximately 115 → 128, showing a slight backward trend, with the 2025 baseline at about 128; the university's enrollment plan in Guangxi for Physics Category: 36 students in 2021 (including Agricultural College), 24 in 2022, 24 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 12 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 13 students, an increase of 1 student (+8.3%) compared to 2025, with a slight expansion slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 4th in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking (stable at 4th from 2021 to 2026), belonging to the top-tier national universities, with strong appeal to high-scoring students; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (involving 16 incidents of academic misconduct, campus safety, etc.); Douyin popularity ranking 42nd (relatively popular), with comprehensive popularity of approximately 989,000; no significant gaps in application records in recent years, overall application attention is moderately high; has 27 A- or above disciplines, including Computer Science and Technology A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Business Administration A+, Biology A+, Clinical Medicine A+, etc., highly matching the enrollment majors (Artificial Intelligence, Electronic Information, Mechanical Engineering, etc.), with top-tier disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University is located in Shanghai, with strong regional appeal to Guangxi students; the university's enrollment proportion in Guangxi is about 2.1%–2.4% (2021–2025), small but stable; Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., are all highly recommended popular majors, with Artificial Intelligence gaining popularity; the total number of examinees in Guangxi in 2026 is about 392,000, with an estimated Physics Category of about 269,000 based on recent proportions, an increase of about 3.3% compared to 260,000 in 2025, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight backward trend in rankings over the past two years, the expansion of 1 student in 2026, and the increase of about 3.3% in Guangxi Physics Category examinees, the competitive environment is overall slightly more intense; however, the university's top-tier level, outstanding advantageous disciplines, and concentrated popular majors maintain strong appeal to high-scoring students. Based on the 2025 baseline of 128, the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is about 139, with a range of 91–187.

- Engineering Experimental Class (School of Biomedical Engineering, Intelligent Medical Engineering Pilot Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 91–187, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., entering the top 100), focus on sprinting for popular A+ discipline majors such as Artificial Intelligence Top Talent Pilot Class and Computer Yongqiang Experimental Class; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range, prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Integrated Circuit Elite Class and Science Experimental Class to ensure admission.
